summary: PixelRAG is a tool that enables users to render documents as screenshots and retrieve information based on visual content rather than just text. It aims to enhance the retrieval-augmented generation process by preserving the visual structure of documents, making it easier to answer questions about complex layouts and graphics.
use_cases: Searching for specific information in web pages with complex layouts
Retrieving data from infographics or charts in documents
Using visual search capabilities to find relevant documents based on images
